title: Jobs to be Done Canvas
description: Christensen JTBD — functional, emotional, social dimensions. Each job requires provenance because all three dimensions need interview backing.

dimension_status.description: Per-dimension validation status for one Christensen dimension (functional/emotional/social).

status.description: Short status phrase, e.g. 'partial — observed-reaction backed' / 'inferred — desk-derived' / 'hypothesis — founder-articulated' / 'validated — interview-extracted'.

backing.description: Evidence supporting this dimension specifically. Free text; cite sources when concrete.

gap.description: What's missing or speculative for this dimension. Names the load-bearing validation event that would close the gap.

validation_status_per_dimension.description: Per-dimension backing audit per Christensen tripartite (functional/emotional/social each need backing). Optional but encouraged when provenance.confidence is heterogeneous across dimensions. Closes a known schema-discipline divergence (cluster instance 8, see engine/consistency-check-spec.md). Aggregate provenance.confidence remains the single number used by gates and threshold calculations; this block is for legibility, not gate computation.
